text: A young dad's colon cancer spread to his lungs with no warning. He says a clinical trial led to a miracle. - CBS News
fullText: Spencer Laird was diagnosed with colon cancer at 26. At 30, he was told it had returned and spread to his lungs, with one tumor the size of a golf ball.

text: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra review: show off - The Verge
fullText: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra features a unique Privacy Display to keep wandering eyes off your screen. It’s a useful update to a feature-packed phone.

text: Trump Strikes Iran’s Kharg Oil Hub and Urges Reopening of Hormuz - Bloomberg.com
fullText: The US struck military sites on Kharg Island, from which Iran exports almost all its oil, for the first time overnight, upping the ante in a Middle East war that’s raged for more than two weeks and shows little sign of easing.

text: Motorhead guitarist Phil Campbell dead at 64: “His legacy, music and the memories he created with so many will live on forever” - Louder
fullText: Phil Campbell passed away away following “a complex and major operation”

text: 'Married to Medicine' Lia Jones Wants To Change Child Custody Agreement - TMZ
fullText: "Married to Medicine: Los Angeles" star Lia Jones wants to change the child custody agreement from her nasty divorce ... and she's asking a judge to grant her more time with her kids.

text: Ray Dalio: I've studied 500 years of history and fear we're entering the most dangerous phase of the 'Big Cycle' - Fortune
fullText: I believe the times ahead will be radically different from what most people have gotten used to—more like the era before 1945 than since.

text: A Paramount-Warner Bros. movie slate could rule the 2027 box office, but is it sustainable? - CNBC
fullText: Paramount CEO David Ellison has said he wants to make 30 movies a year and has franchises like Godzilla-Kong, Superman and Sonic the Hedgehog to lean on.

text: Trump urged uprising, but as bombs fall, Iranians are ‘too scared to move’ - The Washington Post
fullText: Some Iranians living in Dubai say their families celebrated the death of the supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, but the war could leave Iran in a worse situation than before.

text: I spent 17 hours at a legal conference. These were the 2 questions haunting lawyers about AI. - Business Insider
fullText: Billions of dollars are riding on lawyers moving faster with AI. But how many lawyers are actually using the tools?

text: 'We’re constantly surprised': The strange deep-sea creatures that eat whales - BBC
fullText: From bone-eating snot-flowers to snowboarding scale worms, when a whale dies it becomes a colossal island of nutrients – attracting weird and wonderful creatures to feast.

text: Subpoenas against Fed chair Powell tossed in a scathing opinion - Axios
fullText: The judge accused the Trump administration of using the criminal investigation to pressure the head of the world's most important central bank to lower interest rates.

text: House GOP leadership silent as more members post anti-Muslim statements - NPR
fullText: A growing number of Republicans in Congress are embracing rhetoric against Muslims. Their remarks have faced little public pushback from leadership.

text: These are the casualties and cost of the war in Iran 2 weeks into the conflict - NPR
fullText: The war in Iran has already cost the U.S. billions of dollars. Here's the impact by the numbers.

text: U.S. beats Canada 5-3, advances to the World Baseball Classic semifinals - abcnews.com
fullText: Aaron Judge doubled and Pete Crow-Armstrong and Brice Turang each had two hits as the United States beat Canada 5-3 on Friday night to reach the World Baseball Classic semifinals

text: Apple hosts 50th anniversary celebrations around the world - Apple
fullText: Apple kicked off celebrations in New York for its 50th anniversary and will continue commemorating the milestone throughout the month.

text: Trump adviser calls for US to ‘declare victory and get out’ of Iran - Financial Times
fullText: Remarks by AI and crypto tsar David Sacks show anti-war sentiment in the president’s Maga coalition
